arts.ttl: 4 Rangers stars face anxious Bilbao fitness fight as boss flips the schedule with Euro masterplan signed off
arts.sum: The Ibrox side head to Bilbao to take on Athletic Club on Thursday with the tie in the balance after their goalless draw

arts.ttl: Ernesto Valverde baffled by Rangers draw criticism as Bilbao boss talks up the ten men
arts.sum: The Spaniard can;t understand why his team are getting it tight for failing to beat ten-man Gers at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Record-breaking Rangers support puts Bilbao cops on alert as city to be swamped with basketball fans
arts.sum: Barry Ferguson's men are heading to the Basque city for the return leg of their Europa League tie
